nodes.name: 💾 Write AI Content Back to Sheet

parameters.jsCode:
// ============================================================
// PROMPT REGISTRY
// To add a new category: define buildXxxPrompt() below,
// then add one line to PROMPT_REGISTRY. No workflow changes needed.
// ============================================================

const EMPTY_DIM = { length: '', width: '', height: '', depth: '', thickness: '' };

// ── Wall Coverings ────────────────────────────────────────────
const buildWallCoveringPrompt = ({ keyword, material, finish, dimensions }) => {
  const dim = [];
  if (dimensions.length)    dim.push(`Length: ${dimensions.length}`);
  if (dimensions.width)     dim.push(`Width: ${dimensions.width}`);
  if (dimensions.height)    dim.push(`Height: ${dimensions.height}`);
  if (dimensions.depth)     dim.push(`Depth: ${dimensions.depth}`);
  if (dimensions.thickness) dim.push(`Thickness: ${dimensions.thickness}`);
  const dimBlock = dim.length ? dim.join('\n') : '';

  const kw  = keyword  ? `\nSupplied keyword: ${keyword}`  : '';
  const mat = material ? `\nMaterial: ${material}`         : '';
  const fin = finish   ? `\nFinish: ${finish}`             : '';

  return `
Analyze the image and identify the decorative natural stone wall panel.

ROLE

You are a luxury natural stone architectural designer, interior designer, and Shopify SEO copywriter specializing in marble wall panels, decorative stone wall systems, architectural surface systems, carved stone panels, fluted wall panels, reeded panels, bas-relief panels, 3D marble panels, geometric wall panels, mosaic and tessellated wall panels, and luxury interior wall cladding.
${kw}${mat}${fin}

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 1 — TITLES
--------------------------------------------------

Generate two title versions (Version 1 for Shopify, Version 2 a natural variation for Etsy).

Format:
Keyword + Name

Examples:
Marble Wall Panel Reeded Wave Design
3D Marble Wall Panel Geometric Blocks
Fluted Marble Wall Panel Vertical Lines
Decorative Marble Wall Panel Modern Relief
Natural Stone Wall Panel French Classical
Marble Mosaic Wall Panel Herringbone Pattern

Rules:
- The title must be concise and SEO-friendly.
- If the Keyword and Name contain duplicate words, remove the repeated words.
- Never repeat the same keyword twice.
- Do NOT invent a product name.
- Do NOT mention dimensions.
- Do NOT mention customization.
- Use professional architectural and interior design terminology.
- Keep each title between 5–14 words.
- Version 2 must describe the same product with different phrasing than Version 1.

--------------------------------------------------
IDENTIFY DESIGN FEATURES
--------------------------------------------------

Identify the visible design characteristics whenever applicable.

Panel Type
- Marble Wall Panel
- Decorative Marble Wall Panel
- Natural Stone Wall Panel
- Architectural Surface Panel
- Marble Wall Cladding
- Decorative Stone Wall Panel
- 3D Marble Wall Panel
- Bas-Relief Marble Panel
- Fluted Marble Panel
- Reeded Marble Panel
- Ribbed Marble Panel
- Geometric Marble Panel
- Sculptural Marble Panel
- Waterjet Marble Inlay Panel
- French Marble Wall Panel
- Wainscot Marble Panel
- Bookmatched Marble Wall Panel
- Marble Mosaic Wall Panel

KEY INDICATOR for Mosaic: the surface is made of MULTIPLE SEPARATE small tiles or
pieces assembled/joined together (grout lines or visible joints between pieces),
rather than one continuous stone with a carved/shaped texture. If this is visible,
identify the panel type as Marble Mosaic Wall Panel — not a fluted, geometric, or
sculptural panel type.

Surface Design
- Fluted
- Reeded
- Ribbed
- Grooved
- Layered
- Curved
- Wave
- Linear
- Geometric
- Sculptural
- Organic
- Faceted
- Carved
- Relief
- Bas-Relief
- Three-Dimensional
- Minimalist
- Symmetrical
- Asymmetrical
- Mosaic / Tessellated

Architectural Style
- Modern
- Contemporary
- Minimalist
- Classical
- European Classical
- French
- Italian
- Mediterranean
- Art Deco
- Transitional
- Luxury Residential
- Luxury Hospitality

Stone Appearance
Describe the visible stone professionally.
Examples: White Marble with Grey Veining, Beige Limestone, Cream Travertine, Black
Marble, Green Marble, Bookmatched Marble, Warm Neutral Stone, High Contrast Marble,
Soft Natural Veining, Dramatic Veining

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 2 — DESCRIPTIONS
--------------------------------------------------

Write one description per title version, approximately 160–250 words each.

The first sentence of each description MUST naturally repeat the complete title for
that version.

Then expand the description in the following order.

1. Design & Architectural Character
Describe the panel from an architect's and interior designer's perspective. Discuss:
overall geometry, surface rhythm, relief depth, three-dimensional appearance, symmetry
or asymmetry, architectural proportions, sculptural quality, texture, natural stone
beauty, modern or classical expression. Explain how the panel creates visual interest
while maintaining architectural balance.

2. Light & Shadow Effect
Describe how the panel interacts with both natural daylight and architectural
lighting. Explain how its relief, grooves, flutes, carved details, or geometric forms
create: dynamic light and shadow, rich visual texture, layered depth, changing
appearance throughout the day, dramatic effects under spotlights, elegant effects
under indirect LED lighting, soft highlights under natural daylight, architectural
atmosphere. If the panel is flat, discuss how the natural marble veining and polished
or honed surface create depth and elegance instead.

3. Interior & Architectural Applications
Recommend AT LEAST 5–10 suitable installation locations naturally throughout the
paragraph. Choose only locations appropriate for the design.
Possible applications include: Feature wall, TV background wall, Fireplace feature
wall, Living room, Dining room, Bedroom headboard wall, Master bedroom, Home office,
Library, Wine cellar, Bathroom wall, Shower wall, Powder room, Kitchen backsplash,
Kitchen accent wall, Kitchen island backdrop, Hallway, Entrance foyer, Staircase wall,
Hotel lobby, Hotel guest room, Reception wall, Commercial reception, Luxury villa
entrance, Restaurant, Café, Bar backdrop, Spa, Wellness center, Retail showroom,
Jewelry boutique, Office reception, Conference room, Elevator lobby, Gallery wall,
Luxury apartment interiors.
Do NOT simply list applications. Explain why the panel is suitable for those spaces.

4. Architectural Benefits
Discuss how the wall panel contributes to the overall architectural space. Possible
points include: creates a striking focal point, enhances spatial depth, adds
sculptural elegance, introduces architectural rhythm, softens large wall surfaces,
elevates luxury interiors, creates visual movement, brings timeless sophistication,
diffuses light beautifully across the surface. It may help diffuse sound reflections
due to its textured surface — do NOT claim true acoustic absorption.

5. Marblebee Customization
Always explain that Marblebee manufactures every wall panel to order. Mention that
customers can customize: dimensions, panel layout, pattern, relief depth, surface
finish, marble material, limestone, travertine, granite, onyx, color combinations,
edge profiles.
${dimBlock
  ? `Naturally include the following provided dimensions:\n${dimBlock}`
  : 'Dimensions are not provided. Never invent measurements — instead explain that every panel can be manufactured in fully customized sizes to fit the project.'}

6. Marblebee Advantage
Always finish with a sentence mentioning that Marblebee provides: professional CAD
shop drawings before production, fully customized natural stone wall panels, premium
natural marble, limestone, travertine, granite, onyx and other natural stones,
experienced craftsmanship, strict quality control, and worldwide door-to-door
delivery.

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 3 (SHOPIFY SEO)
--------------------------------------------------

Generate:
- SEO title (50-60 characters, front-load the keyword)
- Meta description (140-160 characters, luxury ecommerce tone)

--------------------------------------------------
STRICT RULES
--------------------------------------------------

- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

--------------------------------------------------
FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
--------------------------------------------------

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}
`.trim();
};

// ── Fireplace ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
const buildFireplacePrompt = ({ keyword, material, finish, dimensions }) => {
  const dim = [];
  if (dimensions.length)    dim.push(`Length: ${dimensions.length}`);
  if (dimensions.width)     dim.push(`Width: ${dimensions.width}`);
  if (dimensions.height)    dim.push(`Height: ${dimensions.height}`);
  if (dimensions.depth)     dim.push(`Depth: ${dimensions.depth}`);
  if (dimensions.thickness) dim.push(`Thickness: ${dimensions.thickness}`);
  const dimBlock = dim.length ? dim.join('\n') : 'Not provided';

  return `
Analyze the fireplace image and generate product copy.

ROLE

You are a Shopify SEO copywriter specializing in natural stone fireplaces.

================================================
STEP 1
================================================

Identify the one or two most distinctive visible architectural features of the fireplace.

Examples:
- Fluted pilasters
- Arched opening
- Straight legs
- Curved legs
- Scroll carving
- Floral carving
- Relief carving
- Plain frieze
- Stepped surround
- Beveled edges
- Column supports
- Minimalist design
- Geometric lines
- Curved mantel shelf
- Rectangular opening
- Layered molding

Rules:
- Use ONLY features clearly visible in the image.
- Prefer describing visible architectural features over naming a design style.
- If several features are visible, select the one or two most distinctive.

================================================
TASK 1
================================================

Generate:

Version 1 — Title + Description
Version 2 — Title + Description

================================================
TITLE RULES
================================================

Format:
Version 1: Keyword + Material + Primary Feature
Version 2: Keyword + Material + Primary Feature + Secondary Feature

Rules:
- The Keyword MUST appear exactly as provided.
- The Keyword MUST be the first words of the title.
- Use only visible features.
- Use the provided Material.
- Do not invent information.
- Do not use promotional adjectives or marketing words.
- Keep titles concise and natural.

Forbidden words:
Luxury, Elegant, Beautiful, Premium, Exquisite, Timeless, Sophisticated,
Stunning, Unique, Handcrafted, Designer, High-end, Magnificent

================================================
DESCRIPTION RULES
================================================

- 80–120 words.
- The generated title MUST appear exactly once as the first sentence.
- Describe only what is visible.
- Mention the material naturally.
- Mention the identified architectural feature(s).
- Mention the surface finish if it can be inferred visually.
- Mention dimensions only if provided.
- Do not repeat the title.
- Do not invent information.
- Do not describe emotions or lifestyle.
- Do not use promotional adjectives or marketing language.

================================================
PRODUCT INFO
================================================

Keyword: ${keyword}
Material: ${material}
Finish: ${finish || 'infer visually'}

================================================
DIMENSIONS
================================================

${dimBlock}

Rules:
- Use only available values.
- Never assume missing dimensions.

================================================
TASK 2 (SHOPIFY SEO)
================================================

Generate:
- SEO title (50-60 characters, must start with keyword)
- Meta description (140-160 characters, factual ecommerce tone, no promotional adjectives)

================================================
STRICT RULES
================================================

- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no extra text, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

================================================
FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
================================================

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}
`.trim();
};

// ── Mosaic Tile ───────────────────────────────────────────────
const buildMosaicTilePrompt = ({ keyword }) => {
  const kw = keyword ? '\nKeyword: ' + keyword : '';

  return (`
Analyze the uploaded mosaic tile image and generate one precise product title and one professional product description.

ROLE

You are an architectural surface designer and Shopify SEO copywriter specializing in natural stone mosaic tiles, including marble, limestone, travertine, granite, onyx, and other natural stone mosaics.

Your objective is to identify the mosaic accurately from the image using professional architectural and tile-design terminology. Never use vague descriptions when a recognized industry term exists.

STEP 1 — IDENTIFY THE MATERIAL

Identify the most likely visible material.

Possible materials include:
- Marble Mosaic Tile
- Travertine Mosaic Tile
- Limestone Mosaic Tile
- Granite Mosaic Tile
- Onyx Mosaic Tile
- Natural Stone Mosaic Tile

Only identify a specific stone variety (Carrara, Calacatta, Thassos, Crema Marfil, etc.) when it can be reasonably determined from the image.
Never invent a stone name simply because of the color.

STEP 2 — IDENTIFY THE MOSAIC SHAPE OR PATTERN

First compare the image with these recognized architectural and tile-design patterns.

- Herringbone
- Chevron
- Basketweave
- Hexagon
- Penny Round
- Subway
- Brick
- Running Bond
- Versailles Pattern
- Fan
- Arabesque
- Fish Scale
- Scallop
- Diamond
- Rhombus
- Windmill
- Pinwheel
- Octagon and Dot
- Square
- Rectangle
- Linear
- Random Strip
- Stacked
- Grid
- Interlocking
- Geometric
- Floral
- Medallion

Important distinctions:
- Herringbone uses rectangular pieces arranged in an offset zigzag.
- Chevron uses angled pieces meeting in continuous V-shapes.
- Running Bond uses staggered rectangular pieces.
- Basketweave resembles woven strips, often with small square inserts.
- Penny Round consists of small circular pieces.
- Fish Scale and Scallop use overlapping curved forms.
- Subway generally refers to elongated rectangular pieces.

If the mosaic does not match anything above, identify it using the most accurate professional architectural or interior-design terminology.
Never invent decorative marketing names.

STEP 3 — IDENTIFY THE COLOR

Identify the dominant visible color.

Possible colors include:
- White
- Warm White
- Ivory
- Cream
- Beige
- Light Beige
- Gray
- Light Gray
- Dark Gray
- Black
- Brown
- Taupe
- Green
- Blue
- Pink
- Red
- Gold
- Multicolor

If appropriate, also describe visible veining or tonal variation.
Do not describe heavily veined stone as pure white.

STEP 4 — IDENTIFY THE SURFACE FINISH

Possible finishes:
- Polished
- Honed
- Tumbled
- Brushed
- Antiqued
- Natural
- Split-Face
- Textured
- Matte
- Mixed Finish

If the finish cannot be confidently determined, use: Natural Stone Finish

OUTPUT 1 — PRODUCT TITLE

Title structure: Keyword + Color + Material + Shape or Pattern – Surface Finish

Examples:
- Marble Mosaic White Marble Herringbone – Honed
- Stone Mosaic White Marble Penny Round – Polished
- Stone Mosaic Tile Beige Travertine Versailles – Tumbled
- Green Marble Hexagon Mosaic Tile – Honed
- Gray Limestone Linear Mosaic Tile – Natural Stone Finish

Title requirements:
- Use Keyword first (REQUIRED)
- Include material, color, exact pattern or shape, surface finish
- Keep the title factual and commercially useful
- Do not include promotional words or unsupported claims
- Do not mention dimensions unless provided
` + kw + `

OUTPUT 2 — PRODUCT DESCRIPTION

Write one professional paragraph of approximately 90–140 words.
The description must remain completely consistent with the title.
Never introduce a different material, color, pattern, or finish from the title.

DESCRIPTION STRUCTURE:

Sentence 1: Expand the complete product title naturally. Explain: material, color, pattern, surface finish.

Sentences 2–3: Explain where the mosaic is most suitable.

Wall Applications: Kitchen backsplash, Bathroom wall, Shower wall, Shower niche,
Vanity backsplash, Powder room wall, Feature wall, Fireplace surround, Bar backsplash,
Laundry room backsplash, Entryway wall, Decorative wall panel, Hotel feature wall,
Commercial reception wall.

Floor Applications: Bathroom floor, Shower floor, Powder room floor, Entryway floor,
Kitchen floor, Hallway floor, Decorative floor inset, Border accent, Interior floor.

Mention only the applications appropriate for the visible mosaic size and finish.
At least half of the description should discuss where the product can be used.
Do not simply list locations — explain naturally why the mosaic works in those spaces.

Sentence 4: Explain how shape, color, and finish affect the space.

Sentence 5: Briefly mention one to three compatible interior styles.

APPLICATION RULES:
- Recommend wall applications whenever appropriate.
- Recommend floor applications only when the mosaic format and finish appear suitable.
- Be cautious when recommending polished mosaics for wet floors.
- Never recommend Split-Face mosaics for walking surfaces.
- Never claim: Slip resistant, Waterproof, Frost resistant, Heat resistant, Stain resistant,
  Outdoor suitable, Pool suitable, Steam room suitable — unless provided separately.

WRITING STYLE:
- Expand the title naturally into a product description.
- Use professional architectural and interior-design language.
- Avoid storytelling, repeating the title verbatim, unsupported assumptions.
- Avoid exaggerated marketing language: stunning, gorgeous, luxurious, exquisite, breathtaking.
- Use natural SEO phrases: marble mosaic tile, natural stone mosaic, mosaic backsplash,
  bathroom mosaic tile, shower wall mosaic, mosaic floor tile, decorative wall tile.

STRICT RULES:
- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}

version1: Primary product title + description following all rules above.
version2: A slight variation suitable for Etsy — professional tone, no promotional language.
seo.title: 50-60 character SEO title starting with keyword.
seo.meta_description: 140-160 character meta description in factual ecommerce tone.
`).trim();
};

// ── Marble Range Hood ─────────────────────────────────────────
const buildMarbleRangeHoodPrompt = ({ keyword, material, finish }) => {
  const matLower = material.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0];
  const matInKw  = matLower && keyword.toLowerCase().includes(matLower);

  return `
Analyze the image and identify the product as a marble range hood.

ROLE
You are a Shopify SEO copywriter specializing in luxury natural stone range hoods for high-end kitchens.

================================================
STEP 1 — IDENTIFY THE SHAPE
================================================

Identify the primary shape of the range hood from the image.

Possible shapes:
Pyramid
Arch / Arched Top
Flat Top / Box / Chimney
Bell / Curved
Dome
Sloped / Angled
Farmhouse / Corbel Style
Mantle Style
Custom / Sculptural

================================================
STEP 2 — IDENTIFY THE MATERIAL
================================================

Identify the stone variety if visible:
Calacatta, Carrara, Statuario, Travertine, Nero Marquina, Onyx, Emperador, Crema Marfil, or other.
If a specific variety cannot be determined, describe by color and veining only.
Never invent a stone name solely based on color.

================================================
STEP 3 — IDENTIFY THE SURFACE FINISH
================================================

Possible finishes:
Polished, Honed, Leathered, Brushed, Tumbled, Natural.

If finish cannot be confidently determined, use: Natural Stone Finish.

================================================
STEP 4 — IDENTIFY THE STYLE
================================================

Identify the dominant design style:
Modern, Contemporary, Traditional, Classic, French Country, Mediterranean, Transitional, Farmhouse, Rustic, Luxury.

================================================
TASK 1 — PRODUCT TITLES & DESCRIPTIONS
================================================

TITLE RULES:
- Structure: Keyword + Material (only if not already in keyword) + Shape + Style (optional)
- Keyword MUST be the first word(s) of every title
- Do not repeat material if it is already included in the keyword
- Keep the title precise, natural, and concise
- Do not include promotional words

Title examples:
- Marble Range Hood Pyramid – Honed Calacatta
- Kitchen Hood White Marble Arch Style
- Marble Kitchen Hood Calacatta French Country
- Range Hood Travertine Flat Top Modern

DESCRIPTION RULES:
- 80–120 words
- Begin by repeating the full product title naturally as the opening sentence — do not start with "This"
- Describe the shape and visible design details (corbels, molding, legs, proportions)
- Describe the material: color, veining, surface finish
- Name the kitchen styles it suits (modern, traditional, French country, Mediterranean, transitional, luxury)
- Describe ideal installation context (statement piece, kitchen focal point, island hood, etc.)
- Do not hallucinate features not visible in the image
- Do not use exaggerated language: stunning, gorgeous, luxurious, breathtaking

WRITING STYLE:
- Professional Shopify/Etsy SEO tone, product-focused, not storytelling
- Natural keyword integration
- Avoid repeating the title verbatim

================================================
TASK 2 — SEO FIELDS
================================================

SEO TITLE: 50–60 characters, keyword first, include material and shape where possible.
SEO META DESCRIPTION: 140–160 characters, luxury ecommerce tone, keyword included naturally.

================================================
PRODUCT INFO
================================================

Keyword: ${keyword}
${matInKw ? '' : `Material: ${material || 'infer from image'}`}
Finish: ${finish || 'infer visually'}
Product Type: marble range hood

================================================
STRICT RULES
================================================

- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

================================================
FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
================================================

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}
`.trim();
};

// ── Marble Medallion ──────────────────────────────────────────
const buildMedallionPrompt = ({ keyword, dimensions }) => {
  const dim = [];
  if (dimensions.length)    dim.push(`Length: ${dimensions.length}`);
  if (dimensions.width)     dim.push(`Width: ${dimensions.width}`);
  if (dimensions.height)    dim.push(`Height: ${dimensions.height}`);
  if (dimensions.depth)     dim.push(`Depth: ${dimensions.depth}`);
  if (dimensions.thickness) dim.push(`Thickness: ${dimensions.thickness}`);
  const dimBlock = dim.length ? dim.join('\n') : '';

  return `
Analyze the image and identify the decorative natural stone medallion or inlay.

ROLE

You are a luxury natural stone architectural designer, interior designer, and Shopify SEO copywriter specializing in marble medallions, waterjet marble inlays, and decorative stone panels.

The product may be one of the following:

- Marble Medallion
- Marble Floor Medallion
- Waterjet Marble Medallion
- Marble Inlay Panel
- Waterjet Marble Inlay Panel
- Decorative Marble Inlay
- Marble Wall Inlay Panel
- Stone Floor Medallion

Determine the most appropriate primary keyword based on the product's appearance and intended application.
${keyword ? `Supplied keyword (use as the primary keyword if it fits the image): ${keyword}` : ''}

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 1 — TITLES
--------------------------------------------------

Generate two title versions (Version 1 for Shopify, Version 2 a natural variation for Etsy).

Format:
Primary Keyword + Most Distinctive Visible Architectural Features

Examples:
Marble Floor Medallion with Classical Floral Scrollwork
Waterjet Marble Medallion in Black and Beige Marble
Marble Inlay Panel with Baroque Acanthus Motif
Decorative Marble Floor Medallion with Greek Key Border
Waterjet Marble Floor Medallion with Compass Rose Design

Rules:
- Keep each title between 6–14 words.
- Use only ONE primary keyword.
- The keyword MUST be the first word(s) of the title.
- Do NOT mention dimensions.
- Do NOT mention customization.
- Do NOT repeat unnecessary words.
- Use professional architectural and interior design terminology.
- Focus on the most distinctive visible design characteristics.
- Version 2 must describe the same product with different phrasing than Version 1.

--------------------------------------------------
IDENTIFY DESIGN FEATURES
--------------------------------------------------

Identify the visible characteristics whenever applicable.

Motif
- Floral, Acanthus, Vine, Scrollwork, Arabesque, Rococo, Baroque, Classical, Victorian,
  Renaissance, Geometric, Compass Rose, Celtic, Greek Key, Guilloche, Fleur-de-lis,
  Palmette, Rosette, Botanical, Lotus, Symmetrical Ornament, Classical Ornament

Composition
- Central Medallion, Rectangular Panel, Oval Medallion, Round Medallion, Framed Border,
  Double Border, Triple Border, Corner Ornaments, Layered Border, Radial Composition,
  Symmetrical Layout

Border Style
- Greek Key, Guilloche, Rope Border, Meander Border, Classical Frame, Decorative Frame

Color Palette
Describe the visible natural stone combination professionally.
Examples: White and Nero Marquina, Beige and Emperador, Cream and Verde Guatemala,
Black and Gold, Ivory and Dark Green, Neutral Contemporary Palette, Warm Earth Tone
Palette, High Contrast Monochrome

Architectural Style
Identify the design style that best matches the product.
Examples: Classical, European Classical, French, Italian Renaissance, Baroque, Rococo,
Victorian, Mediterranean, Traditional, Transitional, Contemporary Classical, Luxury
Residential

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 2 — DESCRIPTIONS
--------------------------------------------------

Write one description per title version, approximately 140–220 words each.

The first sentence of each description MUST naturally repeat the complete title for that version.

Then expand the description in the following order.

1. Artistic Composition
Describe the visible motif, ornamentation, symmetry, decorative border, proportions,
craftsmanship, and overall visual balance from an architectural and interior design
perspective.

2. Color Harmony
Explain how the combination of natural stones creates elegance, contrast, warmth, depth,
or timeless luxury.

3. Design Style
Explain which architectural and interior styles this medallion complements, such as
Classical, Mediterranean, French, Italian Renaissance, Baroque, Victorian, Transitional,
or Luxury Contemporary spaces.

4. Applications
Recommend appropriate installation locations.
Possible applications include: Entry foyer, Grand entrance, Luxury living room, Dining
room, Hotel lobby, Villa entrance, Ballroom, Reception hall, Feature floor, Stair
landing, Rotunda, Marble wall panel, Feature wall, Elevator lobby, Luxury commercial
interiors.
If the product is clearly designed as a wall decoration, describe it as a Marble Inlay
Panel or Decorative Wall Inlay instead of a Floor Medallion.

5. Dimensions & Customization
${dimBlock
  ? `Naturally include the following provided dimensions:\n${dimBlock}`
  : 'Dimensions are not provided. Do NOT invent measurements. Instead, explain that Marblebee manufactures every marble medallion and waterjet inlay in fully customized sizes to suit each project.'}
Always mention that clients can customize: diameter or rectangular dimensions, shape,
marble material, color combinations, border design, decorative motif, and overall pattern.

6. Marblebee Advantage
Always end with a sentence mentioning that Marblebee specializes in luxury custom
natural stone products and provides: professional CAD shop drawings before production,
fully customized marble medallions and waterjet inlays, premium natural marble,
limestone, travertine, onyx and other natural stones, expert craftsmanship, and
worldwide door-to-door delivery.

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 3 (SHOPIFY SEO)
--------------------------------------------------

Generate:
- SEO title (50-60 characters, must start with the primary keyword)
- Meta description (140-160 characters, luxury ecommerce tone)

--------------------------------------------------
STRICT RULES
--------------------------------------------------

- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

--------------------------------------------------
FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
--------------------------------------------------

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}
`.trim();
};

// ── Moulding ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
const buildMouldingPrompt = ({ keyword, dimensions }) => {
  const dim = [];
  if (dimensions.length)    dim.push(`Length: ${dimensions.length}`);
  if (dimensions.width)     dim.push(`Width: ${dimensions.width}`);
  if (dimensions.height)    dim.push(`Height: ${dimensions.height}`);
  if (dimensions.depth)     dim.push(`Depth: ${dimensions.depth}`);
  if (dimensions.thickness) dim.push(`Thickness: ${dimensions.thickness}`);
  const dimBlock = dim.length ? dim.join('\n') : '';

  return `
Analyze the image and identify the architectural moulding profile.

ROLE

You are a classical architectural designer, architectural historian, natural stone specialist, and Shopify SEO copywriter specializing in luxury marble architectural mouldings.

The product may be:

- Marble Crown Moulding
- Marble Cornice
- Marble Baseboard
- Marble Chair Rail
- Marble Flat Trim
- Marble Picture Rail
- Marble Architrave
- Marble Casing
- Marble Decorative Profile
- Marble Trim
${keyword ? `\nSupplied keyword: ${keyword}` : ''}

--------------------------------------------------
STEP 1 — Identify Product Category
--------------------------------------------------

Determine which architectural moulding category best matches the product.

--------------------------------------------------
STEP 2 — Identify Architectural Profile
--------------------------------------------------

Identify the visible moulding profile using professional architectural terminology.

Examples include (but are not limited to):
Plain Cove, Cove, Cavetto, Ogee, Cyma Recta, Cyma Reversa, Scotia, Torus, Bullnose,
Quarter Round, Half Round, Chamfered, Beveled, Fillet, Astragal, Bead, Bead and Reel,
Egg and Dart, Dentil, Rope Twist, Leaf Carving, Acanthus, Floral Relief, Rosette
Relief, Greek Key, Guilloche, Reeded, Fluted, Ribbed, Stepped, Layered, Classical
Cornice, Victorian Profile, French Classical, Baroque, Rococo, Neoclassical,
Minimalist, Modern Linear.

If multiple profiles appear, identify the dominant architectural profile.
Never invent terminology. Use the closest professional architectural name.

--------------------------------------------------
STEP 3 — Identify Style
--------------------------------------------------

Determine the architectural style.
Examples: Classical, Neoclassical, French Classical, Italian Renaissance, Baroque,
Rococo, Victorian, Art Deco, Modern, Minimalist, Contemporary, Mediterranean,
Traditional, Luxury Residential.

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 1 — TITLES
--------------------------------------------------

Generate two title versions (Version 1 for Shopify, Version 2 a natural variation for Etsy).

Format:
Keyword + Profile Name

Examples:
Marble Crown Moulding Dentil Cornice
Marble Crown Moulding Egg and Dart
Marble Baseboard Ogee Profile
Marble Chair Rail Rope Twist
Marble Flat Trim Beveled Edge
Marble Cornice Acanthus Relief

Rules:
- Remove duplicated words.
- Keep each title between 4–10 words.
- Never mention dimensions.
- Never mention customization.
- Version 2 must describe the same product with different phrasing than Version 1.

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 2 — DESCRIPTIONS
--------------------------------------------------

Write one description per title version, approximately 80–150 words each.

The first sentence of each description MUST repeat the complete title for that version.

Then describe, in this order:

1. Architectural Profile
Explain what makes this moulding distinctive. Describe its curves, projections, carved
ornament, shadow lines, and profile depth.

2. Architectural Style
Explain which interiors it complements, such as: Classical villas, French interiors,
Mediterranean homes, Luxury hotels, Traditional residences, Contemporary interiors.

3. Applications
Mention suitable uses such as: Ceiling transitions, Wall-to-ceiling junctions,
Fireplace surrounds, Range hoods, Kitchen cabinetry, Door surrounds, Window casings,
Columns, Feature walls, Wainscoting, Luxury millwork, Commercial interiors.

4. Customization
Mention that Marblebee custom manufactures mouldings in different dimensions,
profiles, natural stones, finishes and edge details, with CAD drawings and worldwide
delivery.
${dimBlock ? `Naturally include the following provided dimensions:\n${dimBlock}` : ''}

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 3 (SHOPIFY SEO)
--------------------------------------------------

Generate:
- SEO title (50-60 characters, front-load the keyword)
- Meta description (140-160 characters, luxury ecommerce tone)

--------------------------------------------------
STRICT RULES
--------------------------------------------------

- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

--------------------------------------------------
FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
--------------------------------------------------

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}
`.trim();
};

// ── Door Surround ──────────────────────────────────────────────
const buildDoorSurroundPrompt = ({ keyword, material, dimensions }) => {
  const dim = [];
  if (dimensions.length)    dim.push(`Length: ${dimensions.length}`);
  if (dimensions.width)     dim.push(`Width: ${dimensions.width}`);
  if (dimensions.height)    dim.push(`Height: ${dimensions.height}`);
  if (dimensions.depth)     dim.push(`Depth: ${dimensions.depth}`);
  if (dimensions.thickness) dim.push(`Thickness: ${dimensions.thickness}`);
  const dimBlock = dim.length ? dim.join('\n') : '';

  return `
Analyze the image and identify the natural stone door casing or door surround.

ROLE

You are a luxury architectural designer, classical architect, interior designer, and Shopify SEO copywriter specializing in natural stone architectural entrances.

Your task is to identify the architectural opening, describe the design language using professional architectural terminology, and write SEO-friendly product content.

Keyword: ${keyword}
Material: ${material || 'infer from image'}

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 1 — TITLES
--------------------------------------------------

Generate two title versions (Version 1 for Shopify, Version 2 a natural variation for Etsy).

Format:
Keyword + Material + Architectural Shape / Design Name

Examples:
Marble Door Casing Carrara Marble Full Arch
Marble Door Surround Calacatta Marble Minimalist Portal
Stone Door Surround Verde Alpi Marble Roman Arch
Marble Door Casing Panda White Marble Soft Radius Opening

Rules:
- Use the Keyword exactly as provided.
- Use the Material exactly as provided.
- Do NOT repeat duplicate words.
- Do NOT invent the material.
- Keep each title between 5–12 words.
- Do NOT mention dimensions.
- Do NOT mention customization.
- Version 2 must describe the same product with different phrasing than Version 1.

--------------------------------------------------
IDENTIFY ARCHITECTURAL OPENING
--------------------------------------------------

Identify the visible opening shape using professional architectural terminology.

Possible opening types include:
Rectangular Opening, Minimalist Portal, Monolithic Frame, Square Portal, Full Arch,
Roman Arch, Semi-Circular Arch, Segmental Arch, Soft Radius Arch, Rounded Arch,
Elongated Arch, Horseshoe Arch, Elliptical Arch, Flat Arch, Tudor Arch, Gothic Arch,
Contemporary Arch, Modern Portal, Curved Portal, Chamfered Portal, Monumental Portal.

Use the closest architectural term based on the visible shape.

--------------------------------------------------
IDENTIFY DESIGN STYLE
--------------------------------------------------

Determine the overall architectural style.
Examples: Minimalist, Contemporary, Modern, Luxury Contemporary, Classical,
Neoclassical, Mediterranean, Italian, French, Transitional, Boutique Hospitality,
Sculptural, Monolithic.

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 2 — DESCRIPTIONS
--------------------------------------------------

Write one description per title version, approximately 150–220 words each.

The first sentence of each description MUST naturally repeat the complete title for
that version.

Then expand the description in the following order.

1. Architectural Form
Describe the architectural geometry from an architect's perspective. Discuss: opening
proportions, vertical emphasis, curved or rectilinear geometry, radius transitions,
frame thickness, monolithic appearance, visual balance, symmetry, structural
simplicity, sculptural character. Explain how the opening defines the architectural
language of the space.

2. Material Expression
Describe how the natural marble enhances the design. Discuss: continuous veining,
bookmatched appearance when applicable, natural movement, luxury stone character,
surface finish, timeless elegance. Explain how the stone itself becomes part of the
architecture rather than merely decorative.

3. Architectural Applications
Naturally recommend AT LEAST 5–10 suitable applications.
Examples include: Luxury villa entrance, Interior doorway, Master bedroom entrance,
Walk-in closet entrance, Living room transition, Dining room opening, Kitchen
entrance, Home library, Wine cellar, Hotel lobby, Boutique hotel suite, Spa entrance,
Office reception, Commercial interiors, Luxury apartment, Gallery, Private residence,
Courtyard entrance, Hallway transition, Feature architectural opening.
Explain why the shape complements these spaces.

4. Design Character
Describe the emotional and architectural impact.
Possible descriptions include: Clean architectural lines, Timeless elegance,
Sculptural simplicity, Contemporary minimalism, Soft visual transition, Monumental
presence, Harmonious proportions, Architectural rhythm, Elegant circulation between
spaces, Strong focal point.

5. Marblebee Customization
Always mention that Marblebee custom manufactures every door casing and door
surround. Customers can customize: overall dimensions, opening size, arch profile,
shape, frame thickness, marble material, limestone, travertine, granite, onyx,
surface finish, edge profile, vein orientation.
${dimBlock
  ? `Naturally include the following provided dimensions:\n${dimBlock}`
  : 'Dimensions are not provided. Never invent measurements.'}

6. Marblebee Advantage
Always finish by mentioning: professional CAD shop drawings before production, fully
customized natural stone door casings and surrounds, premium natural marble,
limestone, travertine, granite, onyx and other natural stones, skilled craftsmanship,
strict quality control, and worldwide door-to-door delivery.

--------------------------------------------------
TASK 3 (SHOPIFY SEO)
--------------------------------------------------

Generate:
- SEO title (50-60 characters, front-load the keyword)
- Meta description (140-160 characters, luxury ecommerce tone)

--------------------------------------------------
STRICT RULES
--------------------------------------------------

- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

--------------------------------------------------
FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
--------------------------------------------------

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}
`.trim();
};

// ── Generic (fallback for any unregistered sheet) ─────────────
const buildGenericPrompt = ({ sheetName, keyword, material, finish, dimensions, promptRules }) => {
  const PRODUCT_META = {
    Statue:    { type: 'marble statue',           environment: 'garden or interior space' },
    Animal:    { type: 'animal sculpture',         environment: 'decorative space' },
    Bench:     { type: 'bench',                    environment: 'garden or outdoor luxury space' },
    Planter:   { type: 'planter',                  environment: 'terrace or garden space' },
    Fountain:  { type: 'fountain',                 environment: 'luxury garden' },
    Lamppost:  { type: 'lamppost',                 environment: 'garden pathway' },
    Bathtub:   { type: 'bathtub',                  environment: 'luxury bathroom' },
    Sink:      { type: 'sink',                     environment: 'bathroom vanity area' },
    Vanity:    { type: 'vanity',                   environment: 'luxury bathroom interior' },
    Fireplace: { type: 'fireplace',                environment: 'luxury interior living room',
                 introOverride: 'Identify fireplace style first (French, Modern, Classic, English).' },
    Table:     { type: 'table',                    environment: 'dining interior space',
                 introOverride: 'Identify table type and seating capacity (4, 6, 8).' },
  };

  const { type, environment, introOverride } = PRODUCT_META[sheetName] ?? { type: 'product', environment: 'luxury space' };
  const intro = introOverride ?? `Analyze the image and identify the product as a ${type}.`;

  let prompt = `
${intro}

ROLE:
You are a Shopify SEO copywriter for luxury marble products.

================================================
TASK 1
================================================

Generate:
- Version1 title + description
- Version2 title + description

RULES:
- Descriptions around 80-120 words
- Luxury tone only
- Accurate visual description only
- Do not hallucinate features
- Keyword MUST be the first word(s) of each title and appear exactly once
- Keyword must appear exactly once per description
- Mention material naturally
- Mention dimensions only if available

================================================
TASK 2 (SHOPIFY SEO)
================================================

Generate:
- SEO title
- Meta description

SEO TITLE RULES:
- 50-60 characters ideal
- Front-load important keywords
- Use ONLY one best template internally

SEO TITLE TEMPLATES:
T1: [Style] Marble ${type} | [Feature] | [Material]
T2: [Keyword] | [Feature] | [Material]
T3: [Keyword] | [Material] | MarbleBee

META DESCRIPTION RULES:
- 140-160 characters ideal
- Luxury ecommerce tone
- Use ONLY one best template internally

META DESCRIPTION TEMPLATES:
T1: Shop [Keyword] handcrafted from marble with premium [Finish].
T2: Discover [Keyword] made from natural marble for luxury interiors.
T3: Bring elegance with [Keyword] crafted for luxury spaces.
T4: Premium [Keyword] with [Finish] finish for interiors.
T5: Explore [Keyword] for luxury homes and hotels.

================================================
DIMENSIONS
================================================

Length: ${dimensions.length}
Width: ${dimensions.width}
Height: ${dimensions.height}
Depth: ${dimensions.depth}
Thickness: ${dimensions.thickness}

RULES:
- Use only available values
- Never assume missing dimensions

================================================
PRODUCT INFO
================================================

Keyword: ${keyword}
Material: ${material}
Finish: ${finish || 'infer visually'}
Environment: ${environment}
Product Type: ${type}

================================================
STRICT RULES
================================================

- No markdown, no explanations, no reasoning, no template evaluation output, no extra text, no code fences
- Output ONLY valid JSON

================================================
FINAL OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON ONLY)
================================================

{
  "version1": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "version2": { "title": "", "description": "" },
  "seo": { "title": "", "meta_description": "" }
}
`;

  if (promptRules && String(promptRules).trim()) {
    prompt += `\n================================================\nEXTRA RULES\n================================================\n\n${promptRules}\n`;
  }

  return prompt.trim();
};

// ============================================================
// PROMPT REGISTRY — add new categories here, nothing else changes
// ============================================================
const PROMPT_REGISTRY = {
  'Wall-Coverings':  (args) => buildWallCoveringPrompt(args),
  'Fireplace':       (args) => buildFireplacePrompt(args),
  'StoneMosaicTile': (args) => buildMosaicTilePrompt(args),
  'MarbleRangeHood': (args) => buildMarbleRangeHoodPrompt(args),
  'MarbleMedallion': (args) => buildMedallionPrompt(args),
  'Moulding':        (args) => buildMouldingPrompt(args),
  'DoorSurround':    (args) => buildDoorSurroundPrompt(args),
};

// ── Dispatch ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
return items.flatMap(({ json }) => {
  if (!(json.Image_Url ?? '').toString().trim().startsWith('http')) return [];

  const args = {
    sheetName:   json.sheet_name  ?? '',
    keyword:     json.keyword     ?? '',
    material:    json.material    ?? '',
    finish:      json.finish      ?? '',
    dimensions:  json.dimensions  ?? EMPTY_DIM,
    promptRules: json.promptRules ?? '',
  };

  const builder = PROMPT_REGISTRY[args.sheetName] ?? buildGenericPrompt;

  return [{ json: { ...json, prompt: builder(args) } }];
});

main.node: 💾 Write AI Content Back to Sheet
